test/src/main/java/com/github/thorbenkuc.general_idea: Added imports for javax.inject.Inject and javax.annotation.PostConstruct to support standard DI annotations.
Added import for java.util.UUID to generate unique identifiers for the dependency instance.
Added imports for CommandA and CommandB classes used in injection and provider methods.
Added import for the custom @Provider annotation used to mark provider methods.
Introduced a final String field initialized with a random UUID to uniquely identify the dependency instance.
Replaced the instance initializer block with an explicit constructor containing updated logging output.
Added a method annotated with @PostConstruct to handle post-initialization logic and logging.
Added a public method annotated with @Inject to test public method injection of CommandA.
Added a private method annotated with @Inject to test private method injection of CommandA.
Implemented the id() method from IDependency to return a formatted string containing the instance UUID.
Added a method annotated with @Provider that takes CommandB as an argument and returns a String.
Added a new method signature to the interface to support identification of dependencies.
Replace the legacy WiredTypes API with the new WireRepository API to align with the refactored dependency injection framework.
Add a static initializer to set the global wire conflict strategy, ensuring consistent behavior for the new API.
Explicitly announce a dependency to the repository, reflecting a shift from implicit loading to explicit registration in the new API.
Add test cases for retrieving instances with meta-annotations and executing command lists to validate new framework features.
Demonstrate runtime configuration of the wire conflict strategy to test best-match resolution logic.
Replaced custom @Nullable annotation with JetBrains @Nullable to align with standard annotation libraries.
Added import for JetBrains @NotNull annotation to support non-null parameter validation.
Added import for javax.annotation.PostConstruct to support lifecycle callbacks.
Removed dependency on @Singleton annotation, likely relying on framework defaults or other mechanisms for singleton scope.
Removed dependency on Foo class, replacing it with NonExisting for testing nullable injection.
Added injection of WireRepository to test repository access within the DI container.
Added injection of NonExisting class to test handling of missing dependencies with @Nullable.
Refactored constructor to use @NotNull annotation and improved logging output format.
Enhanced foo() method to print detailed state of all injected dependencies.
Added @PostConstruct method to verify lifecycle callback execution.
Added print method with @PrintParameter annotation to test parameter interception.
Added printAndReturn method with @PrintParameter annotation to test return value interception.

pom.xml.general_idea: Explicitly set the Java source and target version to 17 to align with the migration target.
Add javax.annotation-api dependency to provide annotations like @Generated which are no longer in the JDK module path by default in newer Java versions.
Add jsr250-api dependency to provide annotations like @PostConstruct and @PreDestroy which are no longer in the JDK module path by default in newer Java versions.
Add JUnit 5 (Jupiter) dependency to enable modern testing capabilities compatible with Java 17.
Add JetBrains annotations dependency for enhanced static analysis and null-safety hints.
Upgrade maven-source-plugin to a version compatible with modern Maven and Java 17 build environments.
Upgrade maven-javadoc-plugin to a version that supports Java 17 documentation generation standards.
Add flatten-maven-plugin to handle CI-friendly version properties during the build process.
Explicitly add maven-surefire-plugin to ensure test execution is configured correctly for the new build setup.
Add maven-gpg-plugin to sign artifacts for release, a standard practice for public library distribution.
Rename project artifacts and modules to reflect the new 'WireDI' branding and modular structure.
Move version management to a ${revision} property to simplify multi-module versioning.

test/pom.xml.general_idea: Changed the Maven group ID from com.github.thorbenkuck to de.thorbenkuck.
Renamed the Maven artifact ID from di-test to test.
Updated the project version from 1.0-SNAPSHOT to 1.
Explicitly declared the project packaging type as jar.
Added a property to define the Java version for compilation.
Introduced a parent POM to inherit build configuration and dependencies.
Replaced the custom di-annotations dependency with the Jakarta Inject TCK for JUnit 5.
Replaced the custom di-processor dependency with JUnit Jupiter API.
Removed the maven-source-plugin configuration, likely inheriting it from the parent.
Removed the maven-javadoc-plugin configuration, likely inheriting it from the parent.
Removed the maven-jar-plugin configuration, likely inheriting it from the parent.
Updated the maven-compiler-plugin version from 3.7.0 to 3.8.1.
Changed the compiler source configuration to use the java.version property instead of a hardcoded value.
Changed the compiler target configuration to use the java.version property instead of a hardcoded value.
Updated the MIT license URL to use HTTPS.

.gitignore.general_idea: Added ignore rule for flattened POM files generated by the Maven flatten plugin.
Replaced multiple specific target directory ignores with a single recursive pattern for cleaner maintenance.
Removed Gradle-specific ignore entries as the project appears to be Maven-centric or no longer uses Gradle.
Removed verbose, specific IntelliJ IDEA configuration file ignores in favor of broader standard patterns.
